summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Travo DMC B2B Travel Platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% pass rate). Frontend authentication, navigation, and core features working well. Minor UI/UX issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Chatbot button blocked by overlay element preventing normal clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Can be clicked with force=True option

integration_issues.issue: Admin dashboard shows 0 counts for all data (proposals, airports, cities, hotels) despite backend having seeded data

ui_fixes: Fix AI chatbot button overlay issue (z-index or positioning problem)
Debug admin dashboard data loading - ensure frontend correctly fetches and displays backend data counts
testing_notes: All backend APIs are working perfectly with 100% success rate
Core user flows (signup, login, dashboard, admin) are functional
AI integration with Gemini is working correctly
Payment integration with Stripe is configured and working
recommendations: Consider adding loading states for admin dashboard data
Test flight search modal functionality in more detail
